# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: web-api-service
    url: https://api.example.internal
    routes:
      - name: web-api-route
        paths:
          - /api
        strip_path: true
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
                - https://staging.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Accept
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-API-Key
                - X-Request-ID
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-ID
                - X-RateLimit-Limit
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining
                - X-RateLimit-Reset
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              hide_credentials: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 20
              minute: 500
              hour: 5000
              day: 20000
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-API-Key
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 50
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      day: 50000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true

consumers:
  - username: web-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-client-api-key

  - username: admin-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-client-api-key

plugins:
  - name: cors
    scope: global
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
        - https://staging.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-API-Key
        - X-Request-ID
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    scope: service
    service: web-api-service
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    scope: route
    route: web-api-route
    config:
      second: 20
      minute: 500
      hour: 5000
      day: 20000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true
